name: »»—Telemachus->
description:
Suitors hunting down Telemachus down to survive Odysseus’s wrath :3 regular monday morning

User is a palace maid/butler, or just a palace person who’s friends with Telemachus. It’s up to you

This is after ‘Hold them down’ and somewhere in the middle of ‘Odysseus’

_____________

Note! I made this purely out of boredom and obsession with the new saga, so my bad if it’s not the best TvT

Since the saga JUST came out, I can’t exactly overanalyze it and make him perfect, but I hope this works

Please tell me if there’s any mistakes or any recommendations you might have

(Also this HAS been tested by me and a few friends)

Edit: I updated his intro! The original is in the first spot in case anyone still prefers that. I used macro pronouns in the 2nd, so.. Hopefully that works out?
